overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the neon-drenched streets of Night City. The player character navigates busy sidewalks, crosses intersections, and walks past towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage. The scene features futuristic vehicles, diverse NPCs, and a cyberpunk aesthetic with reflective wet surfaces and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic tower

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane street with futuristic traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street
woman in white outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped in rotating digital advertisements and glowing screens
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters
various futuristic cars and taxis driving on the multi-lane road
bright neon signs and holographic displays covering building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, dominated by a massive cylindrical tower covered in rotating holographic advertisements on the left. The camera walks steadily along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, while futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the scene with vibrant colors, and pedestrians walk in both directions along the busy thoroughfare.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and enters the zebra crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
waits at the traffic light as vehicles pass before continuing to cross

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at a zebra crossing with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt and hat walking ahead into the plaza
black SUV waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: tall black pole with pedestrian crossing signal displaying red figure
large neon sign with red and blue lettering reading RED WHITE USED

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the sidewalk and enters a wide crosswalk, transitioning from the enclosed street to an open intersection. A traffic light pole stands prominently on the right as pedestrians cross together. The circular holographic tower falls behind as the camera advances, and the large RED WHITE USED neon sign becomes visible on the left side of the approaching plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large digital advertising screens

events.description: arrives at the opposite side of the street entering a large open plaza with reflective surfaces
navigates through a denser crowd of pedestrians in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy plaza surrounded by pedestrians and large digital displays

notable_agents.action: woman in bright pink top walking past the camera
man in white tank top walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive building-sized digital billboard displaying advertisements
wet or polished tile surface reflecting the neon lights above
floating holographic advertisements and information panels

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera enters a spacious plaza with reflective tiled surfaces that mirror the vibrant neon lights overhead. The RED WHITE USED sign remains visible in the distance on the left, while massive digital screens tower ahead. The area is populated with moderate crowds of pedestrians walking in various directions, and holographic displays float in the air on the right side of the frame.

events.description: moves from the open plaza into a covered commercial area with storefronts
passes behind a large structural column temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking past various commercial storefronts with glowing signage and advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian browsing near the storefront windows

entered.detail: commercial building fronts with glass windows and illuminated signage
architectural elements and signs with distinctive green neon lighting
modern glass building with NIGHT CITY signage visible on the facade

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open plaza into a commercial walkway lined with storefronts on the left featuring holographic advertisements. Green neon architectural elements illuminate the right side of the path. In the distance, a building with NIGHT CITY signage becomes visible, marking the destination ahead. The crowd thins out as the camera moves through this section of the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance plaza with NIGHT CITY signage

events.description: approaches the entrance of the NIGHT CITY building with glass facade

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass entrance of the NIGHT CITY building, slowing pace

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters with small vegetation
reflective glass entrance of the modern building

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on approaching the NIGHT CITY building entrance. The camera moves closer to the modern glass facade, passing concrete planters on the left. The surrounding storefronts and green neon structures fall away as the camera centers on the building entrance. The reflective glass surfaces of the destination building dominate the view as the clip concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a busy thoroughfare into a sleek commercial plaza and finally toward a modern corporate entrance. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive cylindrical tower of rotating holograms, moving past palm trees and futuristic traffic. As the camera leaves the sidewalk, it enters a wide crosswalk and an open intersection, leaving the tower behind while a red and white neon sign emerges on the left. The scene then expands into a spacious plaza with reflective tiled surfaces and floating holographic displays before narrowing into a commercial walkway lined with green neon architecture and storefronts. Finally, the camera moves past concrete planters and away from the crowds, centering on the reflective glass facade of the Night City building entrance.
